note.zh: 在 Kimi Code 中以 Kimi K3(Max 档位)一次生成,未经修改。与「Kimi 网页版」条目同模型、不同 Harness,可并排对比。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Kimi K3 (Max) inside Kimi Code, unmodified. Same model as the Kimi Web entry under a different harness — compare the two side by side.

note.zh: 在 Kimi Code 中以 Kimi K3(Max 档位)一次生成。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Kimi K3 (Max) inside Kimi Code.

note.zh: Kimi K3(Kimi Code · Max)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「蚕食」。诊断:合法且 fuel 安全——生存不变量完整(绝不踩己尾、每步保留回家路)、断尾反杀与威胁 BFS 撤退逻辑齐全。但实战偏弱:对 baseline-expander 两个种子均告负(318:1045、339:939),扩张过于保守、圈地量小(约 80–92 手却只得 300 出头)。写得干净却太求稳,不敢铺开,被基线三比一碾过。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Kimi K3 (Kimi Code, Max) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "蚕食" (Nibble). Diagnosis: legal and fuel-safe — complete survival invariants (never steps on its own tail, always keeps a path home), full tail-cut punish and threat-BFS retreat. But competitively weak: loses to baseline-expander on both seeds (318:1045, 339:939), expanding too conservatively for a small capture volume (~80–92 moves for barely 300 points). Clean code that plays too safe to spread out, run over ~3:1 by the baseline.
